heading: The Overview of
MSC in Data Science

overViewImage.alt: MSc in Data Science – Program Overview

overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Enter the World of Advanced Data Intelligence
overViewOfOnline.description: The MSC in Data Science at Teksversity helps learners build strong analytical, computational, and statistical abilities essential for modern data environments. Students work with machine learning models, big data platforms, visualization tools, and predictive analytics through simulation-based and project-driven learning. The curriculum strengthens the ability to interpret data, build automated workflows, and support complex decision-making. Designed for working individuals, this master of science in data science online program prepares learners for careers in AI, analytics, engineering, and data-led strategy across global industries.
keyPoints: Understand ML, data engineering, and analytics workflows
Use tools for modelling, dashboards, and automation
Strengthen statistical and computational analysis
Apply ethical and responsible data practices
Develop leadership for technical data roles

heading: Why Choose MSC in Data Science
in Teksversity?
title: 13 Years of
Legacy
(Commitment, Growth, Success)
whyOnline.initialDescription: Teksversity offers a practical, industry-focused MSC in Data Science that combines advanced analytics, machine learning, automation techniques, and data engineering tools. Students work on case studies, simulations, and model-building exercises that replicate real industry applications, helping them strengthen hands-on expertise.

description.firstDescription: Guided by experienced data scientists, the curriculum enables learners to master predictive analytics, visualization, ML fundamentals, and data interpretation. The training helps students understand how data science transforms business systems, operations, and product strategy.

description.secondDescription: The program’s flexible online structure supports working professionals aiming to upgrade their data skills. With resume support, mentorship, and structured placement training, learners gain confidence to move into roles in AI, data engineering, analytics, research, and automation-focused environments.

keyPoints: Case studies on ML, analytics, and data modelling
Projects on dashboards, pipelines, and automation
Workshops on data tools and cloud technologies
Leadership training in analytical communication
Sessions led by data science professionals
One-on-one mentoring from data experts
24/7 access to study resources and tools
Recorded classes for flexible revision
Personalized support for academic growth
Internship assistance for data science roles
Placement help for data and analytics careers
Resume building for technical job roles
Mock interviews led by industry experts
Career mapping for relevant opportunities
Leadership and professional readiness
Webinars with AI and data industry experts
Peer collaboration on modelling tasks
Alumni sessions with data professionals
Group tasks on ML and strategy models
Global networking through virtual events

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience

faq.question: What is an MSc in Data Science?
faq.answer: An MSc in Data Science is a postgraduate program that focuses on statistical analysis, machine learning, data engineering, programming, data visualization, and advanced analytics. It prepares students to solve real-world problems using data-driven insights.

faq.question: Who can pursue this course?
faq.answer: Students with a background in Computer Science, IT, Mathematics, Statistics, Engineering, or related fields can pursue MSc Data Science. Candidates with strong analytical and mathematical skills are ideal for this program.

faq.question: What is the duration of the MSc Data Science program?
faq.answer: The program typically lasts 2 years, divided into semesters that include theory, practical labs, analytics projects, internships, and a final capstone project.

faq.question: What subjects are covered in MSc Data Science?
faq.answer: The syllabus includes Statistics, Python Programming, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Mining, Data Visualization, Big Data Analytics, Cloud Computing, NLP, and Predictive Modeling.

faq.question: What skills will I gain from this course?
faq.answer: You will gain skills in programming (Python, R), statistical modeling, data wrangling, machine learning algorithms, neural networks, data visualization tools, SQL, big data platforms, and cloud-based analytics deployment.

faq.question: What are the career opportunities after MSc Data Science?
faq.answer: Graduates can work as Data Scientists, ML Engineers, Data Analysts, AI Engineers, Data Engineers, Research Analysts, Business Analysts, and Big Data Specialists across IT, finance, healthcare, retail, e-commerce, and more.

faq.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MSc Data Science?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or any quantitative field. Some institutions require entrance exams or merit-based admission.

faq.question: Does the program include hands-on training?
faq.answer: Yes. Students work on real datasets, machine learning projects, big data tools, cloud platforms, data pipelines, and a final capstone project to gain industry-ready practical skills.

faq.question: Which tools and technologies will I learn?
faq.answer: You will learn Python, R, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-Learn, SQL, Hadoop, Spark, Power BI, Tableau, Jupyter Notebook, AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud.

faq.question: What is the future scope for Data Science professionals?
faq.answer: Data Science is one of the fastest-growing fields globally. Professionals have strong opportunities in AI, machine learning, automation, predictive analytics, cloud analytics, and advanced business intelligence roles across every major industry.
